Run a full RTrace scan over a project directory

Source: R/rule_engine.R
run_scan.Rd

Convenience wrapper combining build_context() and run_rules() — the top-level entry point used by the CLI's scan command and by R scripts that want to run RTrace programmatically.

Usage

run_scan(root = ".", config = default_config(), use_cache = FALSE)

Arguments

root

Character scalar path to the project root.

config

An rtrace_config object. Defaults to default_config().

use_cache

Logical, passed through to build_context(). Default FALSE.

Value

An rtrace_diagnostic_set.

On this page
